assessment.summary: The single Medium/P2 cross-shop audit finding is localized to one privileged RPC, and existing actor/shop and product/shop helpers support a proportionate tactical fix.

nonNegotiables: Preserve tenant isolation at every service-role and SECURITY DEFINER write boundary.
Keep Win7POS read-only and outside this analysis.
Do not treat a proposed guard as remediation until it is implemented and revalidated.
assumptions: No measured latency or memory budget was supplied.
The public product-image API shape should remain compatible.
Deployment-specific edge throttling was not measured.

openQuestions: Whether deployment-edge rate limiting already constrains repeated denied requests remains unverified; it does not replace the RPC authorization guard.
